svg.title: research-git capture and removal workflow in Codex
svg.desc: Codex fixes and automatically captures a real KTransformers FlashInfer MLA precision invariant, then uses the saved capsule to safely remove that optimization while preserving the Torch fallback.

g.text: › Fix FlashInfer MLA precision and validate it against the Torch reference.

text.tspan: — Preserve model scale, Torch parity, and
HumanEval 89.6 when enabling FlashInfer MLA. Keep this capsule?

g.text: └ Resolved depends_on graph → no additional capsules
└ Loaded intent, knobs, assumptions, and guide
└ Located FlashInfer branches; confirmed Torch fallback
└ Removed MLA dispatch; preserved model scale
└ Torch and long-context tests passed; no MLA references remain
Removed the FlashInfer MLA optimization without reverting unrelated attention work.
The Torch fallback remains active; the capsule is preserved for future use.
